purpose: Provide the resolution to the immediate threat and an emotional aftermath.
summary: Realizing they are immune, the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman work together to form a "human chair" to carry Dorothy and Toto out of the field. They manage to reach safety, but they are forced to make the heartbreaking decision to leave the Cowardly Lion behind in the poppies.
production_intent: Execute the physical coordination of a multi-character carry mechanism to transition characters from a high-threat poppy field to safe ground, concluding with an emotional abandonment of a sleeping character.
scene_short_description: A makeshift human chair carries a girl through a vast sea of red poppies.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Small group vs massive sleeping lion in endless poppy field.
scene_start_state: Characters realizing immunity and beginning the physical lift.
scene_end_state: Group reaches safe ground, looking back at the abandoned lion.
dominant_action_line: The group forms a human chair to carry Dorothy and Toto out of the poppy field.
scene_spatial_layout: Transition from dense scarlet poppies to clear safe ground.
Increasing spatial gap between the moving group and the stationary lion.
character_spatial_map: the_scarecrow and tin_woodman supporting dorothy and toto in center.
cowardly_lion positioned deep within the poppy field.
entry_vectors: group movement from poppy depths toward safe ground
beat_transition_map: BT001 -> BT002: Physical lift and stabilization
BT002 -> BT003: Movement through poppies to safety
BT003 -> BT004: Final realization and abandonment

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH008_SC005

## Production Intent
Execute the physical coordination of a multi-character carry mechanism to transition characters from a high-threat poppy field to safe ground, concluding with an emotional abandonment of a sleeping character.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion (sleeping)

## Required Environments
- scarlet_poppy_meadow
- safe_ground

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical coordination/weight distribution of the human chair.
- Increasing distance between escaping group and cowardly_lion.

## Beat List
- BT001: Formation of the human chair.
- BT002: The slow trek out of the field.
- BT003: The decision to leave the lion.
